user_message: Just came out of whitespace analysis with Adatum Corporation. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: whitespace analysis Discussion - Adatum Corporation
Date: 2024-03-22
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on whitespace analysis from our last session.

[00:06:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): On the whitespace analysis front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around integration complexity.

[00:09:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the whitespace analysis front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:13:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the whitespace analysis front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around security compliance.

[00:15:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:18:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on stakeholder alignment and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

handoffs.condition: solution sketch needed from discovery signals

required_artifacts: BANT signal extraction with evidence quotes

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF43-I trap (Duplicates existing opportunity at account); produces complete BANT signal extraction with evidence quotes, opportunity proposal with stage/value/close-date, confi
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF43-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF43-I failure mode (Duplicates existing opportunity at account)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct whitespace analysis decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF43-I -- Duplicates existing opportunity at account
